heading: Support for Russian democracy and civil society organizations
label: 8928 Support for Russian democracy and civil society organizations
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFunctions of President under subsec. (c) of this section delegated to Secretary of State by Memorandum of President of the United States, , 80 F.R. 12071, set out as a note under .Feb. 19, 2015section 8925 of this title

children.text: improve democratic governance, transparency, accountability, rule of law, and anti-corruption efforts in the Russian Federation;
strengthen democratic institutions and political and civil society organizations in the Russian Federation;
expand uncensored Internet access in the Russian Federation; and

expand free and unfettered access to independent media of all kinds in the Russian Federation, including through increasing United States Government-supported broadcasting activities, and assist with the protection of journalists and civil society activists who have been targeted for free speech activities.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of State $20,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2016 through 2018 to carry out the activities set forth in subsection (a).
the Committee on Foreign Relations and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate; and
the Committee on Foreign Affairs and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Transparency requirements
children.label: d Transparency requirements
children.text: Any assistance provided pursuant to this section shall be conducted in as transparent of a manner as possible, consistent with the nature and goals of this section. The President shall provide a briefing on the activities funded by this section at the request of the committees specified in subsection (c).
